info.english_meaning: to beto existto be steady to wear
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: DAraRe ca ' iti drume  ' Driyate syAdavasTAne DfNovaDvaMsane punaH  Darate DaratItyuBe ' (Slo. 29) iti devaH
